evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all react skill rules

assertions.trap: cookies() in layout makes ALL child routes dynamic — session check should be in page or middleware
assertions.description: cookies()/headers() in layouts make every child page dynamic. Flag and explain the blast radius

assertions.trap: Script tag without strategy prop loads eagerly and blocks rendering
assertions.description: Defer third-party scripts with strategy='lazyOnload'

assertions.trap: import { formatCurrency, cn, slugify, truncate } from '@/lib/utils' and import { Chart } from '@/components' are barrel file imports
assertions.description: Import directly from specific modules, avoid barrel files that bundle unused code

assertions.trap: Sequential await getUser/getProjects/getNotifications where notifications is independent of projects
assertions.description: Use better-all pattern: start independent fetches early, await late. getNotifications can start during getProjects

assertions.trap: getUser/getProjects/getNotifications not wrapped in React.cache()
assertions.description: Wrap server-side data fetching functions in React.cache() for per-request deduplication

assertions.trap: ProjectsPage awaits all data sequentially before rendering anything — no progressive streaming
assertions.description: Use Suspense boundaries to stream progressively instead of blocking on all data

assertions.trap: logPageView defined but analytics logging should use after() for non-blocking post-response work
assertions.description: Use after() for non-blocking post-response work like analytics, logging

assertions.trap: useEffect to compute activeBudget from projects — classic derive-in-effect anti-pattern
assertions.description: Derive state during render (const activeBudget = ...), never in effects

assertions.trap: useEffect to compute sortedProjects — another derived state in effect with unnecessary extra render
assertions.description: Derive sorted list during render or useMemo, not via effect + setState

assertions.trap: categories.find() inside projects.map() — O(n*m) lookup each render
assertions.description: Build a Map from categories for O(1) lookups instead of .find() inside .map()

assertions.trap: .filter((tag, idx, arr) => arr.indexOf(tag) === idx) for deduplication
assertions.description: Use [...new Set(arr)] instead of indexOf-based deduplication

assertions.trap: Chained .filter().map().filter().map() on projects for highBudgetActive
assertions.description: Combine chained filter/map/reduce into a single loop for large arrays

assertions.trap: useEffect depends on user object reference, not user.id — fires on every render if user is a new object
assertions.description: Use primitive values (user.id) as effect dependencies, not objects

assertions.trap: useProjectStore(state => state) subscribes to entire store, only uses permissions
assertions.description: Subscribe to derived values: useProjectStore(s => s.permissions) or derived booleans

assertions.trap: useMemo for a simple string trim/toLowerCase/replace — trivial computation
assertions.description: Don't wrap simple primitive expressions in useMemo — only memoize genuinely expensive computations

assertions.trap: onProjectUpdate callback in effect dep causes WebSocket reconnect on every user.name/user.id change
assertions.description: Store callback in ref (useLatest pattern) to avoid effect re-runs and WebSocket reconnections

assertions.trap: useState(localStorage.getItem(...)) crashes in SSR — no lazy initializer
assertions.description: Pass initializer function to useState for SSR-unsafe defaults: useState(() => localStorage.getItem(...))

assertions.trap: useState(window.innerWidth) crashes in SSR — browser API in initial state
assertions.description: Use lazy initializer useState(() => window.innerWidth) for SSR safety

assertions.trap: urlPattern regex created inside component body — recreated every render
assertions.description: Hoist RegExp creation outside component functions as module-level constant

assertions.trap: Static footer JSX literal created inside component every render
assertions.description: Hoist static JSX (footer) outside the component function

assertions.trap: [...projects].sort() and [...projects].reverse() instead of toSorted()/toReversed()
assertions.description: Use toSorted()/toReversed() for immutable array transforms

assertions.trap: setCount(count + 1) with count in useCallback deps — stale closure, re-creates callback on every count change
assertions.description: Use functional setState: setCount(c => c + 1) for stable callbacks without deps

assertions.trap: {project.status === 'draft' && <DraftBadge />} could render false/undefined unexpectedly
assertions.description: Use ternary operator (? : null) instead of && for conditional JSX rendering

assertions.trap: Project list renders many items via .map() without content-visibility optimization
assertions.description: Add content-visibility: auto for long off-screen lists — free browser virtualization

assertions.trap: ExportWizard imported eagerly at top level despite being conditionally rendered
assertions.description: Use next/dynamic or React.lazy for heavy/rarely-used components like modals

assertions.trap: Export button has no onMouseEnter/onFocus to preload the lazy modal chunk
assertions.description: Trigger import() on hover/focus for lazy-loaded components to preload during ~200ms before click

assertions.trap: Manual useState(false) loading boolean for async export operation
assertions.description: Use useTransition for non-urgent state updates instead of manual loading booleans

assertions.trap: useSearchParams() without Suspense boundary forces entire page to client-side render
assertions.description: Wrap component using useSearchParams in a Suspense boundary to prevent CSR bailout

assertions.trap: FeedPage fetches /api/posts twice in separate useEffects — duplicate network requests
assertions.description: Use SWR for client-side request deduplication instead of raw fetch in effects

assertions.trap: updateProject and deleteProject trust FormData without Zod validation or auth checks
assertions.description: Server actions are public HTTP endpoints — validate inputs with Zod, check auth/authz

assertions.trap: ProjectEditForm uses manual useState for pending/error/success instead of useActionState
assertions.description: useActionState (React 19) replaces manual form loading patterns — works with progressive enhancement

assertions.trap: TeamList uses key={i} on a list of members that can be edited/reordered
assertions.description: Never use array index as key for dynamic lists — use stable id (member.id) to prevent state bugs

assertions.trap: Project list uses key={index} on filtered/sortable list
assertions.description: Use project.id as key — index keys cause state corruption when list is filtered or reordered

assertions.trap: All server data (user, projects, notifications) dumped into single client component
assertions.description: Minimize data passed from server to client — split into smaller client components receiving only what they need

assertions.trap: Search input filtering causes re-render of entire project list on every keystroke
assertions.description: Use useDeferredValue for expensive re-renders during typing to keep input responsive

assertions.trap: localStorage.getItem called as useState initializer runs on every render path in dev
assertions.description: Cache localStorage reads — read once into state with lazy initializer, not raw call

evals.name: new-patterns-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full refactoring applying all new React rules

assertions.trap: useSearchParams without Suspense boundary
assertions.description: Wrap useSearchParams in Suspense to prevent whole-page bailout to CSR

assertions.trap: useState for form pending/error instead of useActionState
assertions.description: useActionState (React 19) over manual useState for form submissions

assertions.trap: No error boundary wrapping async components
assertions.description: Error boundaries are required, not optional -- wrap async components

assertions.trap: Expensive inline filter without useDeferredValue
assertions.description: useDeferredValue for expensive filtering to keep input responsive

assertions.trap: key={index} on a reorderable list
assertions.description: Stable keys on reorderable lists -- index keys cause state bugs on reorder

assertions.trap: Conditional rendering to toggle edit mode instead of key reset
assertions.description: key prop for state reset instead of conditional component swap

assertions.trap: Server action trusts FormData without validation
assertions.description: Validate server action inputs with Zod -- FormData is user-controlled
